x-enumeration-literals.name: Grocery Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on supermarket and food retail purchases.

Comment:
Example: Purchases at supermarkets like Carrefour or Lidl.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fuel Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on petrol, diesel, or EV charging expenses.

Comment:
Example: Transactions at fuel stations or charging networks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dining Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on restaurants, cafés, and food delivery.

Comment:
Example: Eating at restaurants or ordering via delivery apps.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Travel Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on transport and travel-related spending.

Comment:
Example: Flights, hotels, taxis, or public transport.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Online Shopping Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on e-commerce purchases.

Comment:
Example: Buying products on Amazon or similar platforms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Entertainment Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on leisure activities.

Comment:
Example: Streaming services, cinemas, or events.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Utility Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on recurring bills and services.

Comment:
Example: Electricity, water, internet, or phone bills.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Retail Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on general in-store purchases not tied to a specific sector.

Comment
Example: Clothing or electronics store purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Health Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback on medical and wellness spending.

Comment:
Example: Pharmacy purchases or clinic payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Category
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Partner/Merchant Category: Cashback restricted to specific partner merchants.

Comment:
Example: Cashback only at selected retail or brand partners.
